column2:
0p	paste most recent yank (survives deletes)
vim	:reg	list all registers
vim	ctrl-r {reg} (insert)	insert register contents at cursor
vim	ciw / daw	change/delete inner/around word
vim	gv	reselect last visual selection
vim	. (normal)	repeat last change
vim	u / ctrl-r	undo / redo
vim	:e <file>	edit file
vim	:bn / :bp / :bd	next / prev / delete buffer
vim	:sp / :vsp	horizontal / vertical split

alacritty	alt-c	copy
alacritty	alt-v	paste
alacritty	shift-esc	toggle vi mode
alacritty	ctrl-shift-=	increase font size
alacritty	ctrl-shift--	decrease font size
alacritty	ctrl-shift-0	reset font size
